name: Everyday Verbs
description: Fundamental verbs for daily actions and states

words.definition: To agree to take something
words.example: She decided to accept the job offer.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy quyết định chấp nhận lời mời làm việc.

words.definition: To succeed in doing something good
words.example: You can achieve anything with hard work.
words.exampleVi: Bạn có thể đạt được bất cứ điều gì nếu chăm chỉ.

words.definition: To put something with something else
words.example: Add some salt to the soup.
words.exampleVi: Thêm một ít muối vào súp.

words.definition: To respect and approve of someone
words.example: I really admire your courage.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thực sự ngưỡng mộ lòng can đảm của bạn.

words.definition: To give someone a recommendation
words.example: The doctor advised me to rest.
words.exampleVi: Bác sĩ khuyên tôi nên nghỉ ngơi.

words.definition: To have the same opinion
words.example: I agree with your suggestion.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đồng ý với gợi ý của bạn.

words.definition: To give permission for someone to do something
words.example: My parents don't allow me to stay out late.
words.exampleVi: Bố mẹ không cho phép tôi đi chơi về muộn.

words.definition: To make something known publicly
words.example: They announced their engagement yesterday.
words.exampleVi: Họ đã thông báo việc đính hôn vào hôm qua.

words.definition: To start to be seen
words.example: A rainbow appeared after the rain.
words.exampleVi: Cầu vồng xuất hiện sau cơn mưa.

words.definition: To request something officially (like a job)
words.example: I'm going to apply for a new job.
words.exampleVi: Tôi định ứng tuyển một công việc mới.

words.definition: To speak angrily with someone because you disagree
words.example: They argue about money all the time.
words.exampleVi: Họ tranh cãi về tiền bạc suốt thời gian qua.

words.definition: To plan or organize something
words.example: I need to arrange a meeting with the client.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần sắp xếp một cuộc họp với khách hàng.

words.definition: To reach a place
words.example: What time does the train arrive?
words.exampleVi: Mấy giờ thì tàu đến nơi?

words.definition: To put a question to someone
words.example: Can I ask you a question?
words.exampleVi: Tôi có thể hỏi bạn một câu không?

words.definition: To help someone
words.example: He assisted me with my luggage.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã hỗ trợ tôi mang hành lý.

words.definition: To try to hurt or defeat using violence
words.example: The army attacked the city at dawn.
words.exampleVi: Quân đội đã tấn công thành phố vào lúc bình minh.

words.definition: To try to do something difficult
words.example: He attempted to break the world record.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã nỗ lực phá kỷ lục thế giới.

words.definition: To be present at an event
words.example: Are you going to attend the wedding?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có định tham dự đám cưới không?

words.definition: To stay away from someone or something
words.example: I try to avoid fatty foods.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cố gắng tránh các loại thực phẩm béo.

words.definition: To start to be something
words.example: He wants to become a pilot.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy muốn trở thành phi công.

words.definition: To start to happen or do something
words.example: Let's begin the lesson.
words.exampleVi: Hãy bắt đầu bài học.

words.definition: To think that something is true
words.example: I believe you're telling the truth.
words.exampleVi: Tôi tin là bạn đang nói thật.

words.definition: To be the property of someone
words.example: This book belongs to me.
words.exampleVi: Cuốn sách này thuộc về tôi.

words.definition: To get something from someone to use and return
words.example: Can I borrow your pen?
words.exampleVi: Tôi có thể mượn bút của bạn không?

words.definition: To separate into pieces
words.example: Be careful not to break the glass.
words.exampleVi: Cẩn thận đừng làm vỡ ly.

words.definition: To take someone or something with you
words.example: Don't forget to bring your umbrella.
words.exampleVi: Đừng quên mang theo ô.

words.definition: To make something by putting parts together
words.example: They are building a new bridge.
words.exampleVi: Họ đang xây một cây cầu mới.

words.definition: To get something by paying money
words.example: I need to buy some groceries.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần mua một ít thực phẩm.

words.definition: To phone someone
words.example: I'll call you later tonight.
words.exampleVi: Tôi sẽ gọi cho bạn sau vào tối nay.

words.definition: To decide that an organized event will not happen
words.example: The game was cancelled because of rain.
words.exampleVi: Trận đấu đã bị hủy vì trời mưa.

name: People & Personality
description: Words to describe people and their characteristics

words.definition: A person who is fully grown
words.example: Tickets for adults are more expensive.
words.exampleVi: Vé cho người lớn đắt hơn.

words.definition: Having a strong desire for success
words.example: He is an ambitious young lawyer.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy là một luật sư trẻ đầy tham vọng.

words.definition: A person related to you who lived a long time ago
words.example: My ancestors came from Ireland.
words.exampleVi: Tổ tiên của tôi đến từ Ireland.

words.definition: A very young child
words.example: The baby is sleeping peacefully.
words.exampleVi: Em bé đang ngủ rất ngon.

words.definition: Very attractive to look at
words.example: She is wearing a beautiful dress.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đang mặc một chiếc váy xinh đẹp.

words.definition: Showing no fear of dangerous situations
words.example: Firefighters are very brave people.
words.exampleVi: Lính cứu hỏa là những người rất dũng cảm.

words.definition: Giving a lot of attention to what you are doing
words.example: Please be careful with that vase.
words.exampleVi: Làm ơn hãy cẩn thận với chiếc bình đó.

words.definition: Happy and positive
words.example: She always has a cheerful smile.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy luôn có nụ cười vui vẻ.

words.definition: Quick to learn and understand things
words.example: He's a very clever boy.
words.exampleVi: Cậu ấy là một cậu bé rất thông minh.

words.definition: Feeling sure about your own ability
words.example: Be confident in yourself.
words.exampleVi: Hãy tự tin vào bản thân mình.

words.definition: The child of your aunt or uncle
words.example: I'm visiting my cousin this weekend.
words.exampleVi: Tôi sẽ đi thăm anh họ vào cuối tuần này.

words.definition: Having good imagination to produce new things
words.example: She has a very creative mind.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy có một trí óc rất sáng tạo.

words.definition: Extremely unkind and causing pain
words.example: It's cruel to keep animals in small cages.
words.exampleVi: Thật độc ác khi nhốt động vật trong lồng nhỏ.

words.definition: A female child
words.example: They have two sons and one daughter.
words.exampleVi: Họ có hai con trai và một con gái.

words.definition: Polite word for old
words.example: We should respect elderly people.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta nên tôn trọng người cao tuổi.

words.definition: Known by many people
words.example: He is a famous Hollywood actor.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy là một diễn viên Hollywood nổi tiếng.

words.definition: A person you like and know well
words.example: She is my best friend.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy là bạn thân nhất của tôi.

words.definition: Willing to give money or help freely
words.example: It was very generous of you to pay for dinner.
words.exampleVi: Bạn thật hào phóng khi trả tiền cho bữa tối.

words.definition: Physically attractive (usually for men)
words.example: He is a handsome young man.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy là một chàng trai đẹp trai.

words.definition: Always telling the truth
words.example: I need an honest opinion.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần một ý kiến trung thực.

words.definition: Able to learn and understand things easily
words.example: She's an intelligent student.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy là một học sinh thông minh.

words.definition: Generous, helpful, and thinking about other people
words.example: Thank you for your kind words.
words.exampleVi: Cảm ơn những lời tốt đẹp của bạn.

words.definition: Not willing to work or use any effort
words.example: Get out of bed, you lazy boy!
words.exampleVi: Bước ra khỏi giường đi, đồ lười!

words.definition: Firm and constant in support
words.example: Dogs are known as loyal companions.
words.exampleVi: Chó được biết đến là những người bạn trung thành.

words.definition: A person living near you
words.example: My neighbor is very friendly.
words.exampleVi: Hàng xóm của tôi rất thân thiện.

words.definition: Able to stay calm and not get angry
words.example: You need to be patient with children.
words.exampleVi: Bạn cần phải kiên nhẫn với trẻ em.

words.definition: Having good manners
words.example: He is always polite to everyone.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy luôn lịch sự với mọi người.

words.definition: Caring only about yourself
words.example: Don't be so selfish!
words.exampleVi: Đừng ích kỷ như vậy!

words.definition: A brother or sister
words.example: Do you have any siblings?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có anh chị em ruột nào không?

words.definition: A person you do not know
words.example: Don't talk to strangers.
words.exampleVi: Đừng nói chuyện với người lạ.

name: Home & Furniture
description: Essential words for describing your living space

words.definition: A set of rooms for living in, usually on one floor
words.example: We live in a small apartment downtown.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi sống trong một căn hộ nhỏ ở trung tâm.

words.definition: A comfortable chair with sides that support your arms
words.example: He fell asleep in the armchair.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy ngủ thiếp đi trên ghế bành.

words.definition: An area with a wall or bars around it that is joined to the outside wall of a building
words.example: We have plants on our balcony.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi trồng cây trên ban công.

words.definition: The part of a building that is partly or completely below the level of the ground
words.example: We store our old stuff in the basement.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi để đồ cũ dưới tầng hầm.

words.definition: A room with a bath and/or shower and often a toilet
words.example: The master bedroom has its own bathroom.
words.exampleVi: Phòng ngủ chính có phòng tắm riêng.

words.definition: A room used for sleeping in
words.example: My bedroom is painted blue.
words.exampleVi: Phòng ngủ của tôi được sơn màu xanh.

words.definition: A flat cover made of wool or similar warm material
words.example: It's cold tonight; you might need another blanket.
words.exampleVi: Tối nay trời lạnh; bạn có thể cần thêm một cái chăn nữa.

words.definition: A piece of furniture with shelves or drawers
words.example: The kitchen cabinets are made of wood.
words.exampleVi: Tủ bếp được làm bằng gỗ.

words.definition: Thick material for covering floors
words.example: We need to clean the carpet.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta cần giặt thảm.

words.definition: The upper surface of a room
words.example: The ceiling is very high in this room.
words.exampleVi: Trần nhà của căn phòng này rất cao.

words.definition: A small room or space in a wall for storing things (like clothes)
words.example: I have too many clothes in my closet.
words.exampleVi: Tôi có quá nhiều quần áo trong tủ.

words.definition: A piece of material, especially cloth, that hangs across a window
words.example: Please close the curtains.
words.exampleVi: Làm ơn hãy đóng rèm cửa lại.

words.definition: A type of table that you can work at
words.example: I keep my computer on my desk.
words.exampleVi: Tôi để máy tính trên bàn làm việc.

words.definition: A room where people eat their meals
words.example: We have a large table in the dining room.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi có một chiếc bàn lớn trong phòng ăn.

words.definition: A flat object that is used to close the entrance to something
words.example: Please lock the front door.
words.exampleVi: Làm ơn hãy khóa cửa trước.

words.definition: The flat surface of a room on which you walk
words.example: The floor is made of wood.
words.exampleVi: Sàn nhà được làm bằng gỗ.

words.definition: Things such as chairs, tables, beds, etc.
words.example: We bought some new furniture for the living room.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã mua một số đồ nội thất mới cho phòng khách.

words.definition: A building where a car is kept
words.example: Put the car in the garage.
words.exampleVi: Đưa xe vào nhà để xe.

words.definition: An area of ground where plants and flowers are grown
words.example: She loves working in her garden.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy thích làm việc trong vườn.

words.definition: A room where food is prepared and cooked
words.example: He's in the kitchen making dinner.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đang ở trong bếp nấu bữa tối.

words.definition: A device for giving light
words.example: I turned on the desk lamp.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã bật đèn bàn.

words.definition: The main room in a house where people relax
words.example: We often watch TV in the living room.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi thường xem TV ở phòng khách.

words.definition: A piece of special glass that you can see yourself in
words.example: She looked at herself in the mirror.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy soi mình trong gương.

words.definition: A soft object used to rest your head on in bed
words.example: I need a soft pillow to sleep well.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần một chiếc gối mềm để ngủ ngon.

words.definition: A piece of kitchen equipment used for keeping food cold
words.example: Put the milk in the refrigerator.
words.exampleVi: Cho sữa vào tủ lạnh.

words.definition: The surface that covers the top of a building
words.example: The house has a red roof.
words.exampleVi: Ngôi nhà có mái màu đỏ.

words.definition: A flat board fixed to a wall for putting things on
words.example: I put the books on the shelf.
words.exampleVi: Tôi để sách lên kệ.

words.definition: A long soft seat for more than one person
words.example: Let's sit on the sofa and talk.
words.exampleVi: Hãy ngồi lên ghế sofa và nói chuyện.

words.definition: A set of steps from one level to another
words.example: Walk carefully down the stairs.
words.exampleVi: Đi xuống cầu thang cẩn thận.

words.definition: A space in the wall of a building filled with glass
words.example: Look out the window at the view.
words.exampleVi: Hãy nhìn ra cửa sổ xem phong cảnh.

name: Work & Education
description: Vocabulary for professional and academic environments

words.definition: A person who applies for a job
words.example: There were over 50 applicants for the position.
words.exampleVi: Có hơn 50 người ứng tuyển cho vị trí này.

words.definition: A piece of work given to someone, especially a student
words.example: The teacher gave us a writing assignment.
words.exampleVi: Giáo viên giao cho chúng tôi một bài tập viết.

words.definition: The person who is in charge of an organization
words.example: My boss is very demanding.
words.exampleVi: Sếp của tôi rất khắt khe.

words.definition: A profession that someone does for a long period
words.example: She wants a career in medicine.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy muốn có sự nghiệp trong ngành y.

words.definition: A person that you work with
words.example: I discussed the matter with my colleagues.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã thảo luận vấn đề với các đồng nghiệp.

words.definition: An organization that sells goods or services
words.example: He works for a software company.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy làm việc cho một công ty phần mềm.

words.definition: A legal agreement between people or organizations
words.example: I signed a one-year contract.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã ký hợp đồng một năm.

words.definition: A set of lessons on a particular subject
words.example: I'm taking an English course.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đang học một khóa tiếng Anh.

words.definition: A time by which something must be done
words.example: The deadline for the project is tomorrow.
words.exampleVi: Hạn chót cho dự án là ngày mai.

words.definition: A qualification given to a student by a university
words.example: She has a degree in Physics.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy có bằng Vật lý.

words.definition: A part of an organization (like a company or university)
words.example: She works in the marketing department.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy làm việc ở phòng marketing.

words.definition: A person who is paid to work for someone else
words.example: The company has over 500 employees.
words.exampleVi: Công ty có hơn 500 nhân viên.

words.definition: A person or company that pays people to work
words.example: He is a fair and kind employer.
words.exampleVi: Ông ấy là một người chủ công bằng và tốt bụng.

words.definition: Knowledge or skill gained from doing something
words.example: Do you have any experience in sales?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có kinh nghiệm gì trong việc bán hàng không?

words.definition: A person who has finished a degree at a university
words.example: He is a graduate of Harvard University.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy là người tốt nghiệp đại học Harvard.

words.definition: A formal meeting in which someone is asked questions
words.example: I have a job interview tomorrow.
words.exampleVi: Tôi có một buổi phỏng vấn xin việc vào ngày mai.

words.definition: Information and understanding that you have in your mind
words.example: He has a broad knowledge of history.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy có kiến thức rộng về lịch sử.

words.definition: A person who is in charge of a part of a company
words.example: Talk to the manager if you have a problem.
words.exampleVi: Hãy nói chuyện với quản lý nếu bạn có vấn đề.

words.definition: A planned occasion when people come together
words.example: We have a staff meeting every Monday.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi có cuộc họp nhân viên vào mỗi thứ Hai.

words.definition: A room or building where people work
words.example: Our office is on the third floor.
words.exampleVi: Văn phòng của chúng tôi ở tầng ba.

words.definition: Money paid regularly by the government or a company to a retired person
words.example: My grandfather is living on his pension.
words.exampleVi: Ông tôi đang sống bằng lương hưu.

words.definition: A job that needs special training or education
words.example: Teaching is a respected profession.
words.exampleVi: Dạy học là một nghề đáng được tôn trọng.

words.definition: To raise someone to a higher position at work
words.example: She was promoted to senior manager.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy được thăng chức lên quản lý cấp cao.

words.definition: An official record showing that you have finished training
words.definitionVi: Bằng cấp, trình độ chuyên môn
words.example: You need the right qualifications for this job.
words.exampleVi: Bạn cần những bằng cấp phù hợp cho công việc này.

words.definition: The fixed amount of money that you earn each month
words.example: The company offers a competitive salary.
words.exampleVi: Công ty đưa ra mức lương cạnh tranh.

words.definition: The ability to do something well
words.example: She has excellent communication skills.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy có kỹ năng giao tiếp tuyệt vời.

words.definition: The group of people who work for an organization
words.example: The hotel staff were very helpful.
words.exampleVi: Nhân viên khách sạn rất nhiệt tình giúp đỡ.

words.definition: A person who is learning at a school or college
words.example: I'm a medical student.
words.exampleVi: Tôi là sinh viên ngành y.

words.definition: The process of learning the skills you need for a job
words.example: New employees receive two weeks of training.
words.exampleVi: Nhân viên mới được đào tạo trong hai tuần.

words.definition: A place where people study for degrees
words.example: He's studying at Oxford University.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đang học tại Đại học Oxford.

name: Travel & Transportation
description: Vocabulary for moving around and visiting places

words.definition: An exciting and sometimes dangerous experience
words.example: We had a great adventure in the mountains.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã có một cuộc phiêu lưu tuyệt vời trên núi.

words.definition: A place where planes land and take off
words.example: I'll meet you at the airport.
words.exampleVi: Tôi sẽ gặp bạn ở sân bay.

words.definition: A vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pushing pedals
words.example: I go to school by bicycle.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đi học bằng xe đạp.

words.definition: A card you need to board a plane
words.example: Please show your boarding pass at the gate.
words.exampleVi: Vui lòng xuất trình thẻ lên máy bay tại cửa.

words.definition: A small vehicle for traveling on water
words.example: We took a boat trip across the lake.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã đi thuyền qua hồ.

words.definition: A large vehicle for carrying many passengers by road
words.example: The bus stops right outside our house.
words.exampleVi: Xe buýt dừng ngay trước nhà chúng tôi.

words.definition: To travel regularly between home and work
words.definitionVi: Đi lại (giữa nhà và nơi làm việc)
words.example: I commute to the city every day.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đi làm vào thành phố mỗi ngày.

words.definition: The place at an airport where your bags are checked
words.example: We had to go through customs at the airport.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi phải qua hải quan tại sân bay.

words.definition: A situation where something happens later than expected
words.example: Our flight was delayed by two hours.
words.exampleVi: Chuyến bay của chúng tôi bị trễ hai tiếng.

words.definition: The act of leaving a place
words.example: What is the departure time for your flight?
words.exampleVi: Giờ khởi hành của chuyến bay của bạn là mấy giờ?

words.definition: The place where someone is going
words.example: Paris is a popular tourist destination.
words.exampleVi: Paris là một điểm đến du lịch phổ biến.

words.definition: A person who drives a vehicle
words.example: The taxi driver was very helpful.
words.exampleVi: Tài xế taxi rất nhiệt tình giúp đỡ.

words.definition: The price you pay for a journey on public transport
words.example: Train fares are going up again.
words.exampleVi: Giá vé tàu lại tăng nữa rồi.

words.definition: A journey in an aircraft
words.example: I hope you have a pleasant flight.
words.exampleVi: Tôi hy vọng bạn có một chuyến bay dễ chịu.

words.definition: A person who shows tourists around a place
words.example: Our tour guide was very knowledgeable.
words.exampleVi: Hướng dẫn viên du lịch của chúng tôi rất am hiểu.

words.definition: A building where you pay to stay in a room
words.example: We booked a room at a seaside hotel.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã đặt phòng tại một khách sạn ven biển.

words.definition: A plan of a journey, including the route and places to visit
words.example: The travel agent provided a detailed itinerary.
words.exampleVi: Đại lý du lịch đã cung cấp một lịch trình chi tiết.

words.definition: The act of traveling from one place to another
words.example: I wish you a safe journey.
words.exampleVi: Chúc bạn một hành trình an toàn.

words.definition: The bags and suitcases that you take when you travel
words.example: Please don't leave your luggage unattended.
words.exampleVi: Vui lòng không để hành lý mà không có người trông coi.

words.definition: A drawing that shows where places are
words.example: Let's check the map to see where we are.
words.exampleVi: Hãy kiểm tra bản đồ để xem chúng ta đang ở đâu.

words.definition: A person who is traveling in a vehicle but is not driving it
words.example: There were over 200 passengers on the plane.
words.exampleVi: Có hơn 200 hành khách trên máy bay.

words.definition: An official document for traveling to other countries
words.example: You need a valid passport to travel abroad.
words.exampleVi: Bạn cần một hộ chiếu còn hạn để đi nước ngoài.

words.definition: An arrangement to keep a seat or room for someone
words.example: I'd like to make a dinner reservation for two.
words.exampleVi: Tôi muốn đặt chỗ ăn tối cho hai người.

words.definition: A way or course taken in getting from a starting point to a destination
words.example: What's the best route to the airport?
words.exampleVi: Tuyến đường tốt nhất đến sân bay là đường nào?

words.definition: The activity of visiting interesting places
words.example: We did some sightseeing in London.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã đi tham quan một vài nơi ở London.

words.definition: A large case used for carrying clothes and other things when traveling
words.example: I'm packing my suitcase for the trip.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đang xếp vali cho chuyến đi.

words.definition: A piece of paper that shows you have paid for a journey
words.example: I bought a train ticket to Paris.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã mua một vé tàu đi Paris.

words.definition: A person who visits a place for pleasure
words.example: The city is full of tourists in the summer.
words.exampleVi: Thành phố đầy khách du lịch vào mùa hè.

words.definition: A set of connected vehicles that travel on a railway
words.example: I like traveling by train.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích đi du lịch bằng tàu hỏa.

words.definition: An official mark in your passport that allows you to enter a country
words.example: I need to apply for a student visa.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần xin thị thực du học.

name: Food & Cooking
description: Common words for food, ingredients, and eating out

words.definition: A small dish served before the main meal
words.example: We ordered some spring rolls as an appetizer.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã gọi một ít nem rán làm món khai vị.

words.definition: To cook in an oven with dry heat
words.example: I'm going to bake a cake for your birthday.
words.exampleVi: Tôi định nướng một chiếc bánh cho sinh nhật của bạn.

words.definition: A drink of any type
words.example: Hot beverages include tea and coffee.
words.exampleVi: Đồ uống nóng bao gồm trà và cà phê.

words.definition: To cook something in very hot water
words.example: Boil the eggs for ten minutes.
words.exampleVi: Luộc trứng trong mười phút.

words.definition: The first meal of the day
words.example: I always have breakfast at 7 AM.
words.exampleVi: Tôi luôn ăn sáng lúc 7 giờ.

words.definition: A professional cook
words.example: The chef prepared a delicious meal.
words.exampleVi: Đầu bếp đã chuẩn bị một bữa ăn ngon tuyệt.

words.definition: A style of cooking from a particular country
words.example: I love Italian cuisine.
words.exampleVi: Tôi yêu ẩm thực Ý.

words.definition: Having a very pleasant taste
words.example: This soup is absolutely delicious.
words.exampleVi: Món súp này thực sự rất ngon.

words.definition: Sweet food eaten at the end of a meal
words.example: Would you like some chocolate cake for dessert?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có muốn ăn một ít bánh sô-cô-la cho món tráng miệng không?

words.definition: The main meal of the day, eaten in the evening
words.example: What's for dinner tonight?
words.exampleVi: Tối nay ăn gì?

words.definition: The taste of a particular food or drink
words.example: This ice cream has a strong vanilla flavor.
words.exampleVi: Kem này có hương vani rất đậm.

words.definition: Recently made or picked, not frozen or canned
words.example: I like to buy fresh vegetables from the market.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích mua rau tươi từ chợ.

words.definition: To cook food in hot oil or fat
words.example: Fry the onions until they are golden brown.
words.exampleVi: Rán hành cho đến khi chúng có màu vàng nâu.

words.definition: One of the foods that are used to make a particular dish
words.example: Check the list of ingredients before you start cooking.
words.exampleVi: Kiểm tra danh sách nguyên liệu trước khi bạn bắt đầu nấu.

words.definition: A meal eaten in the middle of the day
words.example: Let's meet for lunch tomorrow.
words.exampleVi: Hãy gặp nhau ăn trưa vào ngày mai nhé.

words.definition: A list of the food that you can eat at a restaurant
words.example: Could I see the menu, please?
words.exampleVi: Cho tôi xem thực đơn được không?

words.definition: The process of taking in food for health and growth
words.example: Good nutrition is essential for a healthy life.
words.exampleVi: Dinh dưỡng tốt là cần thiết cho một cuộc sống lành mạnh.

words.definition: To ask for food or drink in a restaurant
words.example: Are you ready to order?
words.exampleVi: Bạn đã sẵn sàng gọi món chưa?

words.definition: The amount of food served to one person
words.example: The portions here are very large.
words.exampleVi: Các phần ăn ở đây rất lớn.

words.definition: A set of instructions for cooking a particular dish
words.example: I found a great recipe for apple pie.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã tìm thấy một công thức làm bánh táo tuyệt vời.

words.definition: A place where you can buy and eat a meal
words.example: We went to a Japanese restaurant for dinner.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã đi đến một nhà hàng Nhật Bản để ăn tối.

words.definition: A white substance used to flavor food
words.example: Pass the salt, please.
words.exampleVi: Làm ơn đưa cho tôi lọ muối.

words.definition: A thick liquid served with food to add flavor
words.example: I love pasta with tomato sauce.
words.exampleVi: Tôi yêu mì Ý với sốt cà chua.

words.definition: A small amount of food eaten between meals
words.example: I usually have a healthy snack in the afternoon.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thường ăn một món nhẹ lành mạnh vào buổi chiều.

words.definition: Having a sharp taste like lemon or vinegar
words.example: Lemons are very sour.
words.exampleVi: Chanh rất chua.

words.definition: Containing a lot of spice
words.example: I don't like very spicy food.
words.exampleVi: Tôi không thích đồ ăn quá cay.

words.definition: A sweet substance used in food and drinks
words.example: Do you take sugar in your coffee?
words.exampleVi: Bạn có dùng đường trong cà phê không?

words.definition: Tasting like sugar
words.example: This fruit is very sweet.
words.exampleVi: Loại quả này rất ngọt.

words.definition: To have a particular flavor
words.example: This soup tastes great.
words.exampleVi: Món súp này có vị tuyệt vời.

words.definition: A person who does not eat meat
words.example: She has been a vegetarian for ten years.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã ăn chay được mười năm.

name: Health & Fitness
description: Vocabulary related to well-being, illnesses, and exercise

words.definition: A continuous pain that is not very strong
words.example: I have a stomach ache.
words.exampleVi: Tôi bị đau bụng.

words.definition: Unable to stop doing or using something
words.example: He's addicted to computer games.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy bị nghiện trò chơi máy tính.

words.definition: A medical condition that makes you ill when you eat or touch something
words.example: I have an allergy to peanuts.
words.exampleVi: Tôi bị dị ứng với đậu phộng.

words.definition: A vehicle used to take sick or injured people to hospital
words.example: Call an ambulance immediately!
words.exampleVi: Gọi xe cứu thương ngay lập tức!

words.definition: An arrangement to meet someone at a particular time
words.example: I have an appointment with the dentist at 3 PM.
words.exampleVi: Tôi có một cuộc hẹn với nha sĩ lúc 3 giờ chiều.

words.definition: The red liquid that flows through your body
words.example: He lost a lot of blood in the accident.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã mất rất nhiều máu trong vụ tai nạn.

words.definition: A medical examination to check your health
words.example: I go for a medical checkup every year.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đi khám sức khỏe tổng quát mỗi năm.

words.definition: A place where people go for medical treatment
words.example: She works at a local health clinic.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy làm việc tại một phòng khám sức khỏe địa phương.

words.definition: A common illness that makes you sneeze and cough
words.example: I caught a bad cold last week.
words.exampleVi: Tuần trước tôi đã bị một trận cảm lạnh nặng.

words.definition: To force air out of your lungs with a sudden loud noise
words.example: He was coughing all night.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã ho suốt đêm.

words.definition: Something that makes a sick person healthy again
words.example: Doctors are still looking for a cure for cancer.
words.exampleVi: Các bác sĩ vẫn đang tìm kiếm cách chữa trị bệnh ung thư.

words.definition: The food that you eat every day
words.example: A balanced diet is important for health.
words.exampleVi: Một chế độ ăn uống cân bằng rất quan trọng cho sức khỏe.

words.definition: An illness caused by infection or a failure of health
words.example: Lyme disease is spread by ticks.
words.exampleVi: Bệnh Lyme lây lan qua ve bét.

words.definition: A person whose job is to treat sick people
words.example: You should see a doctor about your back pain.
words.exampleVi: Bạn nên đi gặp bác sĩ về chứng đau lưng của mình.

words.definition: To do physical activity to stay healthy
words.example: I try to exercise for 30 minutes every day.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cố gắng tập thể dục 30 phút mỗi ngày.

words.definition: A body temperature that is higher than normal
words.example: The child has a high fever.
words.exampleVi: Đứa trẻ bị sốt cao.

words.definition: A common infectious illness that causes fever and muscle pain
words.example: Many people get the flu in winter.
words.exampleVi: Nhiều người bị cúm vào mùa đông.

words.definition: Being in good physical or mental condition
words.example: He looks very healthy.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy trông rất khỏe mạnh.

words.definition: A place where sick people are treated by doctors and nurses
words.example: She was taken to the hospital by ambulance.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã được đưa đến bệnh viện bằng xe cứu thương.

words.definition: Physical damage to the body
words.example: He suffered a serious knee injury.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy bị một chấn thương đầu gối nghiêm trọng.

words.definition: A substance used to treat an illness
words.example: Did you take your medicine today?
words.exampleVi: Hôm nay bạn đã uống thuốc chưa?

words.definition: A person whose job is to care for sick people in a hospital
words.example: The nurse changed the bandages.
words.exampleVi: Y tá đã thay băng gạc.

words.definition: The process of cutting into a person's body to repair it
words.example: He had an operation on his heart.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã trải qua một ca phẫu thuật tim.

words.definition: An unpleasant feeling in your body caused by injury or illness
words.example: I feel a sharp pain in my shoulder.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cảm thấy một cơn đau nhói ở vai.

words.definition: A person who is receiving medical treatment
words.example: The doctor is seeing a patient right now.
words.exampleVi: Bác sĩ hiện đang khám cho một bệnh nhân.

words.definition: A shop where medicines are sold
words.example: I need to go to the pharmacy to get some aspirin.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần đi đến hiệu thuốc để mua một ít aspirin.

words.definition: A piece of paper on which a doctor writes the medicine you need
words.example: You need a prescription for these antibiotics.
words.exampleVi: Bạn cần một đơn thuốc cho những loại kháng sinh này.

words.definition: To become healthy again after an illness
words.example: It took him a long time to recover from the surgery.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy mất một thời gian dài để hồi phục sau phẫu thuật.

words.definition: A feeling of worry and tension
words.example: Work-related stress can lead to health problems.
words.exampleVi: Căng thẳng liên quan đến công việc có thể dẫn đến các vấn đề sức khỏe.

words.definition: A physical or mental sign of an illness
words.example: Fever and cough are symptoms of the flu.
words.exampleVi: Sốt và ho là các triệu chứng của bệnh cúm.

name: Technology & Media
description: Words for the digital world, computers, and social media

words.definition: A computer program designed for a specific purpose on a mobile device
words.example: I use an app to track my fitness.
words.exampleVi: Tôi sử dụng một ứng dụng để theo dõi quá trình tập luyện của mình.

words.definition: A device that produces electricity to provide power
words.example: My phone battery is low.
words.exampleVi: Pin điện thoại của tôi đang yếu.

words.definition: A website where someone writes about their personal experiences
words.example: She writes a blog about traveling.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy viết một trang blog về du lịch.

words.definition: A program used for looking at pages on the internet
words.example: Which web browser do you use?
words.exampleVi: Bạn dùng trình duyệt web nào?

words.definition: A device for taking photographs or moving pictures
words.example: I bought a new digital camera.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã mua một chiếc máy ảnh kỹ thuật số mới.

words.definition: A television station and the programs it broadcasts
words.example: Change the channel, please.
words.exampleVi: Làm ơn hãy chuyển kênh.

words.definition: To communicate with someone online in real time
words.definitionVi: Nhắn tin, tán gẫu trực tuyến
words.example: I spent the evening chatting with friends online.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã dành cả buổi tối để nhắn tin với bạn bè trực tuyến.

words.definition: An electronic machine that can store and find information
words.example: I use a computer for my work.
words.exampleVi: Tôi dùng máy tính cho công việc của mình.

words.definition: Information, especially facts or numbers
words.example: We need to analyze the data.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta cần phân tích dữ liệu.

words.definition: An object that has been made for a particular purpose
words.example: A smartphone is a useful device.
words.exampleVi: Điện thoại thông minh là một thiết bị hữu ích.

words.definition: To copy a file from the internet to your own computer
words.example: You can download the music from our website.
words.exampleVi: Bạn có thể tải nhạc từ trang web của chúng tôi.

words.definition: A system for sending messages through the internet
words.example: Send me an email with the details.
words.exampleVi: Hãy gửi email cho tôi kèm theo các chi tiết.

words.definition: A collection of information stored together on a computer
words.example: I've saved the file on my desktop.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã lưu tập tin trên màn hình chính của mình.

words.definition: A large system of connected computers around the world
words.example: I found the information on the internet.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã tìm thấy thông tin trên mạng internet.

words.definition: The set of keys on a computer that you press to type
words.example: I need a new keyboard for my computer.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần một bàn phím mới cho máy tính của mình.

words.definition: A small computer that is easy to carry
words.example: I take my laptop everywhere.
words.exampleVi: Tôi mang máy tính xách tay đi khắp nơi.

words.definition: A connection between two pages on the internet
words.example: Click on the link to visit our website.
words.exampleVi: Nhấp vào đường liên kết để truy cập trang web của chúng tôi.

words.definition: A piece of information that you send to someone
words.example: I left a message on his phone.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã để lại tin nhắn trên điện thoại của anh ấy.

words.definition: Able to be moved easily
words.example: Mobile phones have changed the way we communicate.
words.exampleVi: Điện thoại di động đã thay đổi cách chúng ta giao tiếp.

words.definition: A system of connected computers or people
words.example: The company has a large computer network.
words.exampleVi: Công ty có một mạng lưới máy tính lớn.

words.definition: Connected to the internet
words.example: I like to shop online.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích mua sắm trực tuyến.

words.definition: A secret word that allows you to use a computer or website
words.example: Don't tell anyone your password.
words.exampleVi: Đừng nói mật khẩu của bạn cho bất kỳ ai.

words.definition: To put a message or image on a social media website
words.example: She posted some photos from her vacation.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy đã đăng một vài bức ảnh từ kỳ nghỉ của mình.

words.definition: The state of being alone and not watched or disturbed by other people
words.example: Social media users are concerned about their privacy.
words.exampleVi: Người dùng mạng xã hội đang lo ngại về sự riêng tư của họ.

words.definition: The flat surface at the front of a television or computer
words.example: My computer screen is dirty.
words.exampleVi: Màn hình máy tính của tôi bị bẩn.

words.definition: To look for information on the internet
words.example: I searched for the answer on Google.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã tìm kiếm câu trả lời trên Google.

words.definition: A mobile phone that can be used as a small computer
words.example: Everyone seems to have a smartphone these days.
words.exampleVi: Dường như ngày nay ai cũng có điện thoại thông minh.

words.definition: The programs used by a computer
words.example: I need to update my anti-virus software.
words.exampleVi: Tôi cần cập nhật phần mềm diệt virus của mình.

words.definition: To copy a file from your own computer to the internet
words.example: I'm uploading my photos to Facebook.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đang tải ảnh của mình lên Facebook.

words.definition: A set of pages on the internet about a particular subject
words.example: Check out our new website for more information.
words.exampleVi: Hãy xem trang web mới của chúng tôi để biết thêm thông tin.

name: Nature & Environment
description: Words about the natural world, weather, and environmental issues

words.definition: A living thing that is not a human or a plant
words.example: The lion is the king of animals.
words.exampleVi: Sư tử là chúa tể muôn loài.

words.definition: An area of sand or small stones next to the sea
words.example: We spent the day at the beach.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã dành cả ngày ở bãi biển.

words.definition: The general weather conditions of a place
words.example: The climate in this region is very hot.
words.exampleVi: Khí hậu ở vùng này rất nóng.

words.definition: A white or grey mass in the sky that contains rain
words.example: The sun disappeared behind a cloud.
words.exampleVi: Mặt trời biến mất sau một đám mây.

words.definition: The land next to the sea
words.example: We drove along the coast.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi lái xe dọc theo bờ biển.

words.definition: The planet that we live on
words.example: The Earth moves around the sun.
words.exampleVi: Trái đất di chuyển quanh mặt trời.

words.definition: The air, water, and land in or on which people, animals, and plants live
words.example: We should do more to protect the environment.
words.exampleVi: Chúng ta nên làm nhiều hơn để bảo vệ môi trường.

words.definition: The attractive and often brightly colored part of a plant
words.example: What a beautiful flower!
words.exampleVi: Bông hoa đẹp quá!

words.definition: A large area of land covered with trees
words.example: Many wild animals live in the forest.
words.exampleVi: Nhiều động vật hoang dã sống trong rừng.

words.definition: A low green plant that covers the ground
words.example: Don't walk on the grass.
words.exampleVi: Đừng đi trên cỏ.

words.definition: An area of land that is surrounded by water
words.example: They spent their holiday on a tropical island.
words.exampleVi: Họ đã dành kỳ nghỉ trên một hòn đảo nhiệt đới.

words.definition: A large area of water surrounded by land
words.example: We went fishing at the lake.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã đi câu cá ở hồ.

words.definition: A very high hill
words.example: We climbed to the top of the mountain.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã leo lên đỉnh núi.

words.definition: All the plants, animals, and things that are not made by people
words.example: I love spending time in nature.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích dành thời gian hòa mình vào thiên nhiên.

words.definition: A very large area of sea
words.example: The Atlantic Ocean is very wide.
words.exampleVi: Đại Tây Dương rất rộng lớn.

words.definition: A large round object in space that moves around a star
words.example: Mars is known as the Red Planet.
words.exampleVi: Sao Hỏa được biết đến là Hành tinh Đỏ.

words.definition: A living thing that grows in earth and has a stem, leaves, and roots
words.example: Water the plants regularly.
words.exampleVi: Tưới nước cho cây thường xuyên.

words.definition: Damage caused to water, air, etc. by harmful substances
words.example: Air pollution is a major problem in big cities.
words.exampleVi: Ô nhiễm không khí là một vấn đề lớn ở các thành phố lớn.

words.definition: Water that falls from the sky in small drops
words.example: I like the sound of rain on the roof.
words.exampleVi: Tôi thích tiếng mưa rơi trên mái nhà.

words.definition: A large amount of water that flows across land into the sea
words.example: The Thames is a famous river in London.
words.exampleVi: Thames là một con sông nổi tiếng ở London.

words.definition: A substance that is made of very small grains of rock
words.example: The children are playing in the sand.
words.exampleVi: Lũ trẻ đang chơi trong cát.

words.definition: A large area of salt water
words.example: We live near the sea.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi sống gần biển.

words.definition: The area above the earth where clouds and the sun are
words.example: The sky is blue today.
words.exampleVi: Hôm nay bầu trời xanh quá.

words.definition: Soft white pieces of frozen water that fall from the sky
words.example: The ground was covered with snow.
words.exampleVi: Mặt đất được bao phủ bởi tuyết.

words.definition: A small bright light in the sky at night
words.example: The stars are shining brightly tonight.
words.exampleVi: Đêm nay các vì sao đang tỏa sáng lấp lánh.

words.definition: A period of bad weather with strong winds and rain
words.example: There was a violent storm last night.
words.exampleVi: Đã có một cơn bão dữ dội vào đêm qua.

words.definition: The star that gives us light and heat
words.example: The sun rises in the east.
words.exampleVi: Mặt trời mọc ở hướng đông.

words.definition: A tall plant with a trunk made of wood
words.example: Birds are singing in the tree.
words.exampleVi: Chim đang hót trên cây.

words.definition: The conditions of the atmosphere, such as rain or sun
words.example: What's the weather like today?
words.exampleVi: Thời tiết hôm nay thế nào?

words.definition: Moving air
words.example: The wind is blowing strongly.
words.exampleVi: Gió đang thổi mạnh.

name: Abstract Concepts & Qualities
nameVi: Khái niệm trừu tượng & Phẩm chất
description: Nouns and adjectives for ideas, qualities, and states of being

words.definition: The power or skill to do something
words.example: She has a great ability to learn languages.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy có khả năng học ngôn ngữ rất tốt.

words.definition: Something that helps you to be successful
words.example: Speaking English is a big advantage.
words.exampleVi: Nói được tiếng Anh là một lợi thế lớn.

words.definition: The quality of being beautiful
words.example: She is famous for her beauty.
words.exampleVi: Cô ấy nổi tiếng vì vẻ đẹp của mình.

words.definition: An act of choosing between two or more things
words.example: I had no choice but to accept.
words.exampleVi: Tôi không còn lựa chọn nào khác ngoài việc chấp nhận.

words.definition: The possibility of harm or death
words.example: Firefighters face danger every day.
words.exampleVi: Lính cứu hỏa đối mặt với nguy hiểm mỗi ngày.

words.definition: The way in which two things are not the same
words.example: What's the difference between these two cars?
words.exampleVi: Sự khác biệt giữa hai chiếc xe này là gì?

words.definition: An attempt to do something difficult
words.example: He put a lot of effort into his studies.
words.exampleVi: Anh ấy đã bỏ ra rất nhiều nỗ lực cho việc học của mình.

words.definition: A situation in which someone or something is not successful
words.example: Failure is the mother of success.
words.exampleVi: Thất bại là mẹ thành công.

words.definition: The right to live in the way you want
words.example: Everyone wants freedom.
words.exampleVi: Mọi người đều muốn có sự tự do.

words.definition: Something that you hope to achieve
words.example: My goal is to speak English fluently.
words.exampleVi: Mục tiêu của tôi là nói tiếng Anh trôi chảy.

words.definition: The feeling of being happy
words.example: Health is more important than wealth for happiness.
words.exampleVi: Sức khỏe quan trọng hơn tiền bạc đối với hạnh phúc.

words.definition: A suggestion or a plan
words.example: That's a great idea!
words.exampleVi: Đó là một ý tưởng tuyệt vời!

words.definition: The quality of being important
words.example: He emphasized the importance of education.
words.exampleVi: Ông ấy đã nhấn mạnh tầm quan trọng của giáo dục.

words.definition: The system of laws in a country that treats people fairly
words.example: We seek justice for everyone.
words.exampleVi: Chúng tôi tìm kiếm công lý cho tất cả mọi người.

words.definition: Good things that happen by chance
words.example: Good luck with your exam!
words.exampleVi: Chúc bạn may mắn với kỳ thi của mình!

words.definition: The ability to remember things
words.example: I have many happy memories of my childhood.
words.exampleVi: Tôi có nhiều kỷ niệm hạnh phúc về thời thơ ấu của mình.

words.definition: The basic character of a person
words.example: He is kind by nature.
words.exampleVi: Bản chất anh ấy là người tốt bụng.

words.definition: A thought or belief about something
words.example: In my opinion, this book is very interesting.
words.exampleVi: Theo ý kiến của tôi, cuốn sách này rất thú vị.

words.definition: A situation in which there is no war or fighting
words.example: We all hope for world peace.
words.exampleVi: Tất cả chúng ta đều hy vọng vào một nền hòa bình thế giới.

words.definition: The ability to control people or things
words.example: Knowledge is power.
words.exampleVi: Kiến thức là sức mạnh.

words.definition: How good or bad something is
words.example: The quality of the food is excellent.
words.exampleVi: Chất lượng thực phẩm rất tuyệt vời.

words.definition: The cause of an event or situation
words.example: What is the reason for your delay?
words.exampleVi: Lý do cho sự chậm trễ của bạn là gì?

words.definition: The state of being safe from danger
words.example: Road safety is very important.
words.exampleVi: An toàn giao thông rất quan trọng.

words.definition: The achievement of something that you planned or attempted
words.example: The project was a big success.
words.exampleVi: Dự án đã là một thành công lớn.

words.definition: An idea or opinion produced by thinking
words.example: The thought of failing made him nervous.
words.exampleVi: Suy nghĩ về việc thất bại khiến anh ấy lo lắng.

words.definition: The real facts about a situation
words.example: Tell me the truth.
words.exampleVi: Hãy nói cho tôi sự thật.

words.definition: The ability to understand something
words.definitionVi: Sự hiểu biết, sự thấu hiểu
words.example: Mutual understanding is key to a good relationship.
words.exampleVi: Sự thấu hiểu lẫn nhau là chìa khóa cho một mối quan hệ tốt đẹp.

words.definition: The importance or worth of something
words.example: The value of the house has increased.
words.exampleVi: Giá trị của ngôi nhà đã tăng lên.

words.definition: The ability to make good decisions based on knowledge and experience
words.example: He is a man of great wisdom.
words.exampleVi: Ông ấy là một người có trí tuệ lớn.

words.definition: The period of your life when you are young
words.example: I enjoyed my youth.
words.exampleVi: Tôi đã tận hưởng tuổi trẻ của mình.
